function parseFallbackField(fallbackField) {
    if (typeof fallbackField === 'string') {
        return "PRERENDER";
    } else if (fallbackField === null) {
        return "BLOCKING_STATIC_RENDER";
    } else if (fallbackField === false) {
        return "NOT_FOUND";
    } else if (fallbackField === undefined) {
        return undefined;

            configurable: true
        });
